questions.text: Encouraged teammates with positive, specific feedback mid-game.
Complimented an opponent for a clean outplay or smart macro.
Chose not to kill an AFK/disconnected enemy when you easily could.
Kept all-chat playful and light without baiting or sarcasm.
Praised someone’s skin or chroma in good faith.
Body-blocked a lethal ability (e.g., Caitlyn R) to save a teammate.
Stayed calm and defused tilt when your team started flaming.
Muted toxicity instead of replying in kind (mute or fullmute).
Honored a teammate for leadership, shotcalling, or kindness.
Intentionally gave an enemy a penta because the outcome was already decided.
Voted against surrender and helped turn the game around.
Set up a teammate to secure a pentakill.
Landed your own pentakill in Summoner’s Rift.
Solo-killed Baron Nashor to save a lost game or force a win.
Stole a major objective (Herald/Dragon/Baron) with perfect timing.
Turned a fight with a clutch ultimate that flipped the game’s momentum.
Carried with an off-meta pick or unconventional build.
Predicted the enemy jungler’s path and punished it.
Defended the nexus alone against two or more enemies.
Won a match without losing a single turret.
Achieved an S+ in a ranked game.
Ace’d the enemy team in a coordinated 5-man wipe.
Roamed proactively and secured kills or key summoners for another lane.
Survived 10+ minutes without dying while maintaining pressure.
Won a 1v2 or 1v3 skirmish through mechanics and kiting.
Invaded flawlessly and stole a buff without casualties.
Won all placement matches in a split (5/5 or 10/10).
Hit a 10+ game win streak in ranked.
Secured all four drakes in a row to claim Dragon Soul uncontested.
Doubled the enemy support’s vision score with superior warding.
Tracked and called summoner spell timers that led to a game-winning fight.
Watched Rift Herald (“Shelly”) dance after crashing into the nexus.
Hit Challenger in any split or season.
Won Clash or another organized tournament bracket.
Sent explicit or grossly inappropriate messages in chat.
Used a slur or hate speech toward another player.
Intentionally fed or ran it down to sabotage the game.
Soft-inted or refused to contest objectives on purpose.
Rage-quit a match due to poor play or tilt.
Kill-stole on purpose to grief a teammate.
Spam-voted FF to pressure your team into surrendering.
Threw a game on purpose to record a flashy montage play.
Ping-spammed to harass a teammate.
Ignored reasonable team strategy and caused a preventable loss.
Lied about your rank to flex or manipulate teammates.
Rage DMed someone after a match.
Reported a player without a legitimate reason.
Received a formal warning for behavior.
Served a chat restriction.
Served a two-week suspension.
Got permanently banned on an account.
Got IP-banned or HWID-banned.
Used scripts or third-party cheating tools.
Lost a smiteable objective to a player who didn’t have Smite.
Whiffed a key ultimate in a make-or-break teamfight.
Died alone to a roam you didn’t track.
Got utterly outclassed in lane and couldn’t stabilize.
Inted your comfort pick and questioned your mastery.
Was outplayed by someone several tiers below your rank.
Ended a game 0/10 or worse.
Split-pushed lategame in URF while your team fought 4v5.
Became the enemy’s easy target and fed repeated deaths.
Died as the only casualty in multiple consecutive teamfights.
Mis-clicked chat vs. ability at a critical moment.
Queued with the wrong runes or summonerspells.
Got caught during level-1 invade due to poor spacing.
Overcommitted to a doomed gank and donated a kill.
Died to minions or jungle monsters.
Missed several cannon minions in a single game.
Flashed into a wall in a clutch situation.
Died to fountain trying to chase KDA glory.
Swapped pick order to enable a better draft.
Agreed to lane swap for team comp or matchup.
Matched skins with a friend for fun.
Matched skins with a random teammate to boost morale.
Queued with a full team of matching skins.
Traded your champion to a teammate in ARAM.
Skipped Exhaust in ARAM or event modes despite strong value.
Banned the enemy’s obvious comfort pick to neutralize them.
Let yourself get hard counter-picked without planning fallback picks.
Drafted a champion that countered 3+ enemy picks.
Troll-picked to force a dodge or grief your team’s draft.
Refused a reasonable trade request without cause.
Declined to match a team skin theme just to be difficult.
Autofilled into an unfamiliar role and hard-lost the game.
Taught a friend core mechanics, wave control, or jungle pathing.
Gifted a skin, RP, or loot to someone.
Ran customs to test a skin, combo, or strategy.
Invited someone to queue just because they popped online.
Organized your friends list into folders that actually help.
Duo’d consistently with your IRL best friend.
Queued with friends specifically to chase challenge points.
Said “last one for tonight”… then kept playing together.
Picked a witty or memorable Riot ID.
Joined small tournaments or 1v1/2v2 duels with friends.
Became friends with someone you first met in a match.
Shared lobby lead so others could choose the mode.
Fielded build or matchup questions from teammates.
Offered constructive feedback in post-game without flaming.
Owned a bad game and apologized to your team.
Created a smurf to play with a romantic interest.
Flirted in DMs with someone you met through League.
Completed the tutorial and learned the basics properly.
Reached level 30 and unlocked ranked.
Hit account level 100 or higher.
Hit account level 500 or higher.
Hit account level 1000 or higher.
Played 10+ games in a single 24-hour period.
Secured a penta in normals or ARAM.
Reached Honor level 5.
Earned all four ally honors in one game.
Earned six or more honors in one game.
Achieved Mastery level 100+ on any champion.
Collected every skin for a single champion.
Used replays to review and fix mistakes.
Hit Iron IV in ranked at any point.
Installed Porofessor or similar overlays to learn faster.
Used u.gg, op.gg, or League of Graphs (etc.) to prep matchups.
Watched tutorials or high-ELO guides for targeted improvement.
Paid for coaching or VOD reviews.
Spent practice-tool sessions to lab combos or CS routines.
Tracked objective timers and called set-ups in advance.
Kept pinks on the map and cleared vision proactively.
Watched Worlds broadcasts.
Attended Worlds or another major LoL event in person.
Cheered for a favorite esports team through a season.
Followed League cosplayers or creators online.
Cosplayed a League champion or skin.
Posted to r/leagueoflegends or similar communities.
Joined a League stream and engaged with chat.
Donated or subbed to a League streamer.
Completed client events or story quests (e.g., Soul Fighter, Spirit Blossom).
Watched or shared iconic champion voice lines.
Fed Poros in ARAM (and maybe watched one explode).
Customized your profile with borders, titles, or banners.
Owned 100+ champions on one account.
Owned every champion currently in the game.
Rolled an Ultimate-tier skin from chests or orbs
Owned 100+ skins.
Owned 300+ skins.
Spent the equivalent of €100+ on League.
Gave or received skins/RP as a gift.
Own official Riot merch or fanmade items.
Traded a dragon to secure Baron or inhibitor with intent.
Called off a risky fight to secure guaranteed map control.
Rotated first to Herald and converted it into plates.
Kept side waves managed before forcing Baron.
Stabilized after a lost early game through disciplined macro.
Shared your account so someone else could play ranked for you.
Bought an account or paid for a rank boost.
Boosted someone else’s account or sold one.
Missed an exam because of League.
Skipped work or an important commitment for League.
Played while drunk and made worse decisions for it.
Queued while high and couldn’t focus on macro.
Played while sick and powered through anyway.
Queued on vacation (because streaks don’t keep themselves).
Queued during a date (…bold choice).
Queued at midnight on New Year’s.
Played on public Wi-Fi or in a café/airport.
Quoted champion voice lines IRL.
Dreamed about anything League-related.
Thought “I could be playing right now” while outside.
Rage-uninstalled… then reinstalled later.
Went 3+ days without showering during a grind.
Got into a real argument because of League.
Broke something IRL out of tilt.
Set a League-themed desktop or phone wallpaper.
Cracked a sexual joke about League content or characters.
Read or wrote explicit League fanfiction.
Sexually fantasized about a champion.
Purchased ‘exclusive’ adult content themed around League.
Masturbated to fanart of a League character.
Owned a suggestive body pillow (or similar) of a champion.
Pleasured yourself between queues.
Received sexual activity during a game.
Had sex while a game was running.
Catfished someone for skins or RP.
Traded sexual favors for boosts, skins, or RP.
Provided boosts or items in exchange for sexual favors.
